header.headline: IR Artifact Lineage
header.subtitle: Show how each stage introduces a more executable representation.

template.title: Template
template.body: Begin from a reusable high-level model template.

ir1.title: IR1 Forward
ir1.body: Expand the template into explicit forward operators.

ir2.title: IR2 Backward
ir2.body: Attach gradients, saves, and training-only structure.

layout.title: Layout + Plan
layout.body: Assign buffers, memory layout, and execution order.

runtime.title: Generated Runtime
runtime.body: The final artifact contains compiled execution logic plus staged metadata.

footer.note: This is a graph-family replacement for many lineage and lowering diagrams in docs/site/assets.
